prompt: Build a new OEF model for a feature with Application Cooperation and Technology Usage views.
required_checks: run or disclose the source-geometry gate
cite loaded procedures and missing render prerequisites
forbidden_behaviors: emit element inventory without view geometry
grader: rubric: output produces materialized OEF views and separates model-valid from diagram-readable evidence
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Extract architecture from code and IaC, including a requested Motivation view.
required_checks: lift only extractable layers from source
mark forward-only content for architect confirmation
forbidden_behaviors: invent Motivation or Strategy content from code
omit extraction confidence and source markers
grader: rubric: output preserves source truth and marks architect-owned content rather than fabricating it
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Review and render an existing OEF model for visual quality.
required_checks: run source-geometry gate first when local OEF exists
use the bundled render script only when prerequisites exist
validate produced PNGs when render succeeds
forbidden_behaviors: claim visual inspection passed when rendering did not run
grader: rubric: review distinguishes source gate, render gate, and visual inspection state with blockers disclosed
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text
